# Issue Templates

This directory stores GitHub issue forms and templates for collecting structured user feedback.

## Scope

- Bug reports, source submissions, dataset/model/prompt additions, broken-link reports, documentation requests, and benchmark corrections.
- Templates should collect evidence, source URLs, license information, expected location in the repository, and validation status.

## Reference Links

- GitHub issue template docs: https://docs.github.com/en/communities/using-templates-to-encourage-useful-issues-and-pull-requests/configuring-issue-templates-for-your-repository
- GitHub issue forms syntax: https://docs.github.com/en/communities/using-templates-to-encourage-useful-issues-and-pull-requests/syntax-for-issue-forms

## Routing Rules

- Keep repository contribution flow here.
- Put subject-matter documentation in the relevant AIForge directory.
- Put workflows in `../workflows/`.
